# Release Notes Template

Use this template when creating a new release. Copy the relevant section from `CHANGELOG.md`.

## What's Changed

### New Features
- List new features here

### Improvements
- List improvements and enhancements here

### Bug Fixes
- List bug fixes here

### Technical Changes
- List technical or internal changes here

## Installation

Download `Enchanter.zip` and extract to your `World of Warcraft/_anniversary_/Interface/AddOns/` directory.

## Usage

Run `/ec scan` after learning recipes, then `/ec start` to begin matching chat requests.
